---
title: "Code"
author: "Ben Wollack"
date: "2026/05/21"
format: pdf
editor: source
execute:
  message: false
  warning: false
---

```{r}
#| label: read-in

# read in packages
library(tidyverse)
library(here)

# read in my data and store it as an object called ben-data
ben_data <- read.csv(here("data", "ben-data-tracker - Sheet1.csv"))
```
